prestazioni: AMS Performance Alpha 6 turbo kit for the EA888 Evo4 (DNWA) 2.5L TFSI engine, featuring a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 106mm anti-surge compressor housing, and integrated wastegate, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe and AMS-spec intercooler core (1200hp capable, supporting 35+ psi boost with E85 fueling)

034 Motorsport Stage 3+ High-Pressure Fuel System for DNWA, including a billet fuel rail, dual Bosch Motorsport 450LPH high-flow fuel pumps, and 1000cc ID1000 injectors, calibrated via Cobb Accessport V3 with custom ethanol-compensated maps for 40% E85 blends

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, 10-position rebound damping, and 18-way compression adjustment, featuring custom valving for the Formentor VZ5’s 5-link rear suspension geometry, paired with OMP Racing 25mm front and 22mm rear adjustable anti-roll bars with spherical bearings
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for Cupra Formentor, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated canards, rear overfenders with aggressive 50mm flares, and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for the VZ5’s quad-tip setup, finished in 3M Matte Graphite Grey (212-G)

Rotiform LAS-R 20x9.5 ET35 (front) and 20x11 ET40 (rear) forged wheels in Satin Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear), paired with AP Racing 380mm 6-piston front and 356mm 4-piston rear brake calipers with two-piece floating rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for the DNWA intercooler, featuring a custom 2x2 twill weave and matte clear coat, paired with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes and a 50mm overhang for increased downforce at 120+ mph
